summary: Iteration 166: HotelRunner v2 Shadow Mode Automation implementation. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified with all 5 new panels rendering correctly: Shadow Otomasyon panel (automation status + manual trigger button), Readiness Trend, Drift Trend, Latency Trend, and Failure Trend panels. Celery Beat schedules verified for 6-hourly snapshots, daily summaries, and weekly retention cleanup.

issues: i18n translation keys showing as raw keys (common.welcome, auth.signIn, etc.) - pre-existing issue from iteration 161

critical_code_review_comments: Shadow automation engine correctly implements 6-hourly periodic snapshots with observation, readiness, dry-run chain, and alert generation
Daily summary generation correctly calculates trends for readiness, drift, latency, and failure over 24h period
Retention cleanup correctly implements 30-day snapshot, 90-day summary, and 60-day alert retention policies
Alert rules correctly check 6 conditions: readiness_low (<70), readiness_warn (70-85), drift_high (>=5), dlq_nonempty (>0), auth_failure (>0), dry_run_chain_fail
Celery Beat schedules correctly configured: hrv2-shadow-snapshot (every 6h), hrv2-daily-summary (00:00 UTC), hrv2-retention-cleanup (Sunday 05:00 UTC)
ops-dashboard endpoint correctly includes automation.status and automation.trends fields
All automation endpoints properly use tenant_id query parameter for multi-tenant support
Turkish language labels used throughout UI (Shadow Otomasyon, Manuel Snapshot Tetikle, Readiness Trend, etc.)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All new UI components render and function correctly

seed_data_creation: None - used existing syroce_default tenant data with 6 snapshots already present
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 166 verified all newly added HotelRunner v2 Shadow Mode Automation features. Backend endpoints tested: GET /automation/status (automation status with schedule, snapshots_24h, active_alerts), POST /automation/trigger (manual 6-hourly snapshot with readiness, chain, alerts), GET /automation/trends (readiness_trend, drift_trend, latency_trend, failure_trend arrays), GET /automation/alerts (alert history with severity filter), GET /automation/daily-summaries (daily summary history), POST /automation/alerts/acknowledge (acknowledge specific alert), GET /ops-dashboard (includes automation.status and automation.trends). Celery Beat schedules verified: hrv2-shadow-snapshot (every 6h), hrv2-daily-summary (00:00 UTC), hrv2-retention-cleanup (Sunday 05:00 UTC). Frontend at /hrv2-ops displays: Shadow Otomasyon panel (data-testid=automation-status-panel) with Manuel Snapshot Tetikle button (data-testid=trigger-auto-snapshot-btn), Readiness Trend panel (data-testid=trend-readiness-panel), Drift Trend panel (data-testid=trend-drift-panel), Latency Trend panel (data-testid=trend-latency-panel), Failure Trend panel (data-testid=trend-failure-panel). All trend panels show bar charts with tooltips. Manual trigger button successfully triggers snapshot and shows toast notification.

trigger_auto_snapshot_btn.action: Triggers POST /automation/trigger and shows toast notification

displays: Bar chart with score-based colors (green >=90, amber >=70, red <70)
Bar chart with count-based colors (green =0, amber <5, red >=5)
Tooltips with time and drift count
Bar chart with latency-based colors (blue <=1000ms, amber <=3000ms, red >3000ms)
Bar chart with error_rate-based colors (green =0, amber <5%, red >=5%)
Tooltips with time, error rate, and fail count

mocked_api_note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints backed by real MongoDB. External HotelRunner API calls during dry-run chain are NO-OP by design (this is the feature, not a mock).
